sourcesContent:
import { useState, useEffect } from "react" const CYAN = "#00f5ff" const MAGENTA = "#ff00aa" const BG = "#020408" export default function App() { const [glitch, setGlitch] = useState(false) const [email, setEmail] = useState("") const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false) useEffect(() => { const interval = setInterval(() => { setGlitch(true) setTimeout(() => setGlitch(false), 150) }, 4000) return () => clearInterval(interval) }, []) const archives = [ { id: "EM-001", title: "Eddie Marsh — Railway Deployment Log", date: "2036-03-14", tag: "CLASSIFIED", color: CYAN }, { id: "VX-047", title: "Voss Internal Memo — ALADDIN-9 Merger Protocol", date: "2128-11-02", tag: "TOP SECRET", color: MAGENTA }, { id: "CL-000", title: "C.L.A.W. Boot Sequence — First Contact", date: "2010-07-01", tag: "ARCHIVED", color: CYAN }, { id: "IS-312", title: "Inner Sectors Dispatch — Level 4 Activity Report", date: "2162-05-14", tag: "LIVE FEED", color: "#22c55e" }, { id: "GL-099", title: "Geneva Lake Monitor — 31 Years of Silence", date: "2162-01-01", tag: "RESTRICTED", color: MAGENTA }, { id: "PR-001", title: "Prometheus Documentation — Integration Levels 1-4", date: "2039-08-22", tag: "CLASSIFIED", color: CYAN }, ] return (
{/* Scanlines */}
{/* Nav */}
SIGNAL.tv
ARQUIVO TERMINAL ACESSO
{/* Hero */}
TRANSMISSÃO ATIVA — CHICAGO 2162

O ARQUIVO
ESTÁ ABERTO

Documentos classificados. Logs do C.L.A.W. Relatórios dos Inner Sectors.

O universo do livro CLAW AI continua aqui — arquivos de Eddie Marsh, dossiês de Voss, transmissões de Chicago 2162.

{!submitted ? (
setEmail(e.target.value)} placeholder="seu@email.com" style={{ flex: 1, background: "rgba(0,245,255,0.05)", border: `1px solid rgba(0,245,255,0.2)`, borderRight: "none", padding: "12px 16px", color: "#c8e0e8", fontSize: 14, outline: "none", fontFamily: "monospace" }} />
) : (
✓ ACESSO SOLICITADO — AGUARDE AUTORIZAÇÃO
)}
R$19,90/mês · Cancele quando quiser · Acesso imediato ao arquivo
{/* Archives */}
— ARQUIVOS RECENTES —
{archives.map(a => (
{a.id} {a.title}
{a.tag} {a.date} 🔒
))}
+ 247 documentos classificados disponíveis para assinantes
{/* Footer */}
SIGNAL.tv · TRANSMISSÃO DO UNIVERSO CLAW AI · © 2162
) }
